overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a horse-drawn carriage journey through rolling prairie hills. The weather transitions from sunny to stormy as the carriage travels along a dirt path, revealing a distant lake before encountering another carriage under darkening skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: rolling prairie hills with dry grass and scattered oak trees

agents.ego_description: driving horse-drawn carriage along winding dirt trail through enclosed rolling hills

entered.detail: winding dirt trail cutting through the prairie hills
dry grass-covered hills framing the path on both sides
green leafy trees dotting the hillside landscape
wooden telegraph pole visible on the left hillside
rock formations and boulders on the right hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a horse-drawn carriage traveling along a dirt trail through rolling prairie hills under a clear blue sky. The landscape is characterized by dry golden grass, scattered oak trees, and rocky outcrops, with a utility pole visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open prairie with panoramic lake and mountain views

events.description: landscape opens up revealing a large lake and distant mountains on the horizon

agents.ego_description: continuing along the trail as the vista opens to reveal water and distant mountain ranges

entered.detail: large body of water visible in the distance beyond the hills
mountain range visible on the horizon behind the hills

segments.scene_description: As the carriage continues, the enclosed hills give way to an expansive vista featuring a distant lake and mountain range. The trail remains a dirt path through dry grasslands, with scattered trees passing by on either side as the camera moves forward.

events.description: sky darkens significantly as heavy storm clouds roll in, changing the lighting from bright sun to diffused overcast
passing another horse-drawn carriage traveling in the opposite direction on the trail

agents.ego_description: driving through increasingly stormy weather while navigating past another carriage on the narrow trail

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling in the opposite direction, passes by on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: prominent large oak tree standing alone near the path

segments.scene_description: The final segment features a dramatic shift to stormy weather with dark clouds covering the sky. The carriage passes a large oak tree and encounters another horse-drawn carriage traveling in the opposite direction. The lake remains visible in the distance to the right as the path continues through the increasingly windswept prairie.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a dirt trail that transforms from a bright, sunny prairie into a dark, stormy landscape. It begins with a horse-drawn carriage traveling through rolling hills of dry golden grass and rocky outcrops under a clear blue sky. As the carriage moves forward, the enclosed terrain opens into an expansive vista revealing a distant lake and a mountain range. The scene then shifts dramatically as dark clouds cover the sky and the weather turns stormy, with the wind picking up across the prairie. Finally, the camera passes a large oak tree and encounters another carriage traveling in the opposite direction while the distant lake remains visible to the right.
